title: bartlettina ornata
intro: Bartlettina ornata, also known as the "Mexican mint plant", is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Bartlettina ornata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
